summary: Full end-to-end test of Suitcase & Life. Backend: 10/10 pytest tests PASS (health, products structure, featured>=4, 4+ media per product, single GET, 404, like increment, like 404, categories unique, /refresh). Frontend: 32/33 Playwright assertions PASS. 1 minor responsive issue: horizontal overflow at 375px mobile caused by the Hero ticker marquee (scrollWidth=464 vs viewport=375). All core flows work: hero copy, bento grid (4 tiles + black accent), archive with 10 cards, filter pills, product detail modal (thumbnail switch, I'm interested -> You liked this, idempotent second click, view source), header nav + CTA.

issues: Ticker marquee causes horizontal page scroll (documentElement.scrollWidth=464 vs viewport=375). Parent/body needs overflow-x: clip/hidden, or the marquee track should be wrapped in an overflow-hidden container so content doesn't expand page width. At 768px and 1440px no overflow.

action_items: Fix horizontal overflow at 375px by ensuring the Hero ticker/marquee track is inside an element with overflow-x: hidden (or add global html,body { overflow-x: clip; }).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('shutdown'); prefer FastAPI lifespan context for future-proofing.
CORS_ORIGINS env split on ',' will silently allow '*' if not configured; document expectation.
_load_products_raw is sync and called from async routes; for the sheet fetch path (network), consider running in a threadpool or using httpx async to avoid blocking the event loop.
Like endpoint recomputes product list just to validate the id exists — could reuse cached ids; minor perf.
Frontend App.js error state only shows axios error message; no retry button.
seed_data_creation: None created. Used built-in 10-item SAMPLE_PRODUCTS fallback (Google sheet empty).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py - run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v. Sample data returns exactly 10 products with 4 featured; categories: Electronics, Furniture, Home, Fragrance, Travel. Likes persist in MongoDB db.likes collection keyed by slug id. Frontend external URL from REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Known minor issue: horizontal overflow at 375px from hero marquee.
rca of the issue: Hero ticker marquee renders a wide translating strip. Its inner track width exceeds viewport (464px at vw=375) because the element hosting the marquee lacks overflow-x: hidden / clip on an ancestor up to <html>, so the document scrollWidth grows. Fix: add `overflow-x: hidden` (or clip) on the marquee container or globally on body.
